en.name_en: Letter of Nakayama Kōnao
en.description_en: A written document (letter) classified as a tangible cultural property in the category of classical texts. It is town-designated in Nakayama Town and held at Endōji temple in Nagasaki.

en.description_en: A stone stupa slab (itabi) classified as a tangible cultural property in the category of archaeological materials. It is town-designated in Nakayama Town and located within the precincts of Inari Shrine in Nagasaki.

en.description_en: A votive picture tablet (ema) classified as a tangible folk cultural property. It is town-designated in Nakayama Town and held at Hakusan Shrine in Kanazawa.

en.description_en: A historic site classified as a monument (historic site). It is town-designated in Nakayama Town and located at 4669-1 Nagasaki.

en.description_en: A large ginkgo tree classified as a monument (natural monument). It is town-designated in Nakayama Town and located at 419-1 Nagasaki.
